title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Pune University International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Pune University International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Pune University International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Vijayawada operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Pune University International Enterprises:
Pune University International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pune University International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
